.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(240, 241, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #E0E2E5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#E0E2E5, color-mix(in srgb, #E0E2E5 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #E0E2E5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#E0E2E5, color-mix(in srgb, #E0E2E5 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(240, 241, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(240, 241, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(240, 241, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(146, 161, 161) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgb(224, 226, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(214, 217, 220) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
